ScreenRecorderPage.installHint: Click 'Install Screen Recorder' to start recording after the tool is installed

ScreenRecorderList.getListFailed: Failed to get screen recorder list: {error}
ScreenRecorderList.loginRequired: Please log in before uploading screen recordings

ScrecorderModal.screenRecorderDesc: On Windows, all screens will be recorded and merged into one file; on MacOS, multiple screens will generate multiple files
ScrecorderModal.framerateHelp: Higher framerate means smoother video but larger files
ScrecorderModal.speedHelp: Lower values are slower, higher values are faster

ReactPlayerVideo.fileNotPlayable: This video file cannot be played
